title: Spear & Jackson 6758GS Razorsharp Geared Anvil Secateurs
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: SK5 steel blade for lasting sharpness
PTFE coated blade for smooth cutting and resistance to rust
Comfortable grip and ambidextrous locking catch
description: From the manufacturer Spear & Jackson Spear & Jackson has been selling hand, garden, contractors, agricultural and landscaping tools since 1760. The company was founded in the City of Sheffield, which is famous for the production of steel, cutlery and hand tools and continues to be our home over 250 years later. Razorsharp Geared Anvil Secateurs The Spear and Jackson Razorsharp Geared Anvil Secateurs feature a geared action for easier cutting and a PTFE coated SK5 steel cutting blade for smooth cutting, lasting sharpness and resistance to rust. The anvil (knife like) cutting action utilised by these secateurs is suited to use on thicker or dead woody material. The body of the secateurs is light due to its cast aluminium construction with a comfortable grip and ambidextrous locking catch. Product Features & Benefits Part of The Razorsharp Range The Spear & Jackson Razorsharp Garden Cutting range includes our Pro, Advance, Advantage, Steel and Active variants. These encompass a wide range of loppers, secateurs, shears and more to satisfy the needs of both gardening hobbyists and professionals. Our ergonomic designs, combined with quality manufacturing ensure that everyday gardening is easy and enjoyable through the precise and powerful performance our Razorsharp range delivers. Our Promise All Spear & Jackson products undergo rigorous quality inspection and testing. We cover against defects in manufacturing subject to wear and tear and the provision of reasonable care and maintenance.
